```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
#wcg-ws-open(
  day: "Day 4", num: 4, title: "One small shift",
  purpose: "To turn one observation into a specific \"when-then\" plan.",
  how: [A plan works better when it is specific enough to picture. Fill in the
  blanks to make one small, realistic shift.],
)

#wcg-panel(title: "Worked example")[
  *When* I open the shopping app after dinner, *then* I will add items to a list
  and check them tomorrow.
]

#wcg-field("When (the situation or cue)", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Then (the small thing I will do)", lines: 2)
#wcg-field("Why this feels doable", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("How I will know I did it", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Reflection — is my plan specific enough to picture?", lines: 1)

```

> **A gentle reminder.**
>
> Small and doable beats big and abandoned. You can always adjust it later.

```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-footer()
```
